message:
Update parity report artifacts with expanded conformance (546/546 pass)

Regenerated parity report reflecting 521 transform + 25 RNG = 546 total
cases across 7 families (jit:58, grad:106, vmap:30, lax:293,
control_flow:11, mixed_dtype:23, random:25), 100% pass rate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
